name: Filesystem
description: File system operations for reading and writing files
_rejected_tools_rationale: These 6 MCP tools overlap with built-in SDK tools (Read, Write, Edit, Glob). Blocking them saves ~1k tokens/session, eliminates tool-choice ambiguity, and ensures file operations go through security_hooks. The remaining 8 MCP tools (directory_tree, list_directory, get_file_info, create_directory, move_file, read_media_file, etc.) are kept because they have no built-in equivalent. This does NOT reduce agent capability — self-evolution uses Read/Edit/Grep/Bash which are all built-in.
